name: Vichyssoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large pot. Add the leeks and onion and cook until tender but not browned.
2. Add water and chicken broth and bring to a boil.
3. Knead flour into the remaining 3 tablespoons butter to form a paste, then stir into the boiling mixture with a wire whisk to blend well. Season to taste with salt and white pepper.
4. Add potatoes, reduce heat, and simmer until the potatoes are soft.
5. Press through a sieve. Cool.
6. Add cream and half and half to the soup, then chill.
7. Top each serving with a sprinkling of chopped chives.
